headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Johnson Controls Intl, Raises Price Target to $175
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Chris Snyder   maintains Johnson Controls Intl (NYSE:JCI) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $140 to $175.

headline: Wolfe Research Highlights Progress in Johnson Controls’ (JCI) Lean Transformation
summary: Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) is included among the Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 3, Wolfe Research raised its price recommendation on Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) to $171 from $165. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the stock. The firm came away encouraged after Johnson Controls’ investor event, which […]
